evidence_summary: Pfizer officially completed the acquisition of Metsera, Inc. on November 13, 2025. The transaction was an all-cash deal valued at approximately $7.0 billion in enterprise value, with additional contingent value rights (CVRs) bringing the potential total value to $10 billion. Following the close of the transaction, Metsera's common stock was delisted from Nasdaq and it became a wholly owned subsidiary of Pfizer.
